message:
beads: add 8 new beads + comprehensive testing requirements for all 197 open beads

Second-pass audit of all beads against 18,179-line spec. Changes:

New beads created (8):
- bd-26be: §18.4.1.2-18.4.1.3 AMS F2 Sketch + Data Collection
- bd-3u2v: §18.4.1.3.2 Heavy-Hitter SpaceSaving + Zipf MLE
- bd-1p75: §18.8 Retry Policy: Beta-Bernoulli Expected-Loss Controller

New cross-section dependency wiring:
- §13 Built-in Functions → §9 Trait Hierarchy
- §14 Extensions → §9 Trait Hierarchy
- §15 Encryption → §11 File Format (reserved bytes)
- §17.7 Conformance Testing → §12 SQL Coverage
- §18.8 Retry Policy → §5.8 Conflict Detection
- §10.7 VDBE → §11.1 Database Header
- §6.5 MVCC Ghost Lists → §5 MVCC Core

Detailed testing comments added to 52 beads covering §6-§23:
- §6 ARC Cache: 5 beads with 39 unit tests + 4 E2E tests
- §7 Checksums: 3 beads with 42 unit tests + 3 E2E tests
- §9 Trait Hierarchy: 3 beads with 53 unit tests + 10 E2E tests
- §10 Query Pipeline: 4 beads with 74 unit tests + 13 E2E tests
- §11 File Format: 5 beads with 93 unit tests + 14 E2E tests
- §12 SQL Coverage: 8 beads with 238 unit tests + 8 E2E tests
- §13 Built-in Functions: 6 beads with 195 unit tests + 6 E2E tests
- §14 Extensions: 7 beads with 178 unit tests + 7 E2E tests
- §16 Implementation Phases: 6 beads with 134 acceptance criteria
- §17 Testing Strategy: 8 beads with 115 unit tests + 8 E2E tests
- §18 Probabilistic Conflict Model: 5 beads with 63 unit tests + 5 E2E tests
- §19-§23: 5 beads with testing requirements

Graph health: 324 total beads, 343 edges, no cycles, 64 actionable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
